name: Voddiraju Sriman Rutvik
tagline: Wayne-Stark Initiative: Securing the Multiverse through automated threat detection and operational resilience.

soc: Proficient in real-time alert triage and incident investigation using SIEM (Splunk/ELK).
Hands-on experience with packet-level forensics (Wireshark) to identify anomalous traffic.
Committed to 24/7 operational resilience and proactive threat mitigation.
detection: Designing custom detection logic for brute-force and lateral movement patterns.
Automating log parsing workflows via Python to reduce mean-time-to-detection (MTTD).
Analyzing MITRE ATT&CK techniques to implement defensive countermeasures.
blueTeam: Hardening network infrastructure through vulnerability assessments and CI/CD security.
Implementing zero-trust messaging protocols for secure incident response comms.
Continuous learning via simulated SOC environments (LetsDefend).

timeline.detail: Focused on SOC Engineering, Digital Forensics, and Tactical Network Infrastructure.
Validated skills in SIEM triage, threat mitigation, and operational documentation.
Execution of real-time malware analysis and anomalous behavior investigations.

testimonials.quote: Sriman demonstrates a high level of operational discipline and a keen eye for anomalous patterns. His technical foundation is solid.

normal.hero: Acknowledge. This is Sriman Rutvik, Lead SOC Analyst. My focus is on absolute operational resilience and real-time multiversal threat detection. We architect security systems that aren't just redundant—they're proactive. sky is the limit. Initiation sequence complete.
normal.about: Operating from SRM University AP, I specialize in zero-trust infrastructure and automated defense. My mission is technical excellence in the service of high-integrity security environments.
normal.skills: Monitor the arsenal. I maintain peak proficiency across Splunk, Kali Linux, and full-spectrum network forensics. Every tool is calibrated for maximum tactical visibility.
normal.projects: Accessing mission archives. From Scapy IDS engines to Python log parsers—performance is the only metric. We don't just detect threats; we neutralize them.
normal.certs: Operational verification complete. Certifications from Google, IBM, and Cisco serve as proof-of-concept for my technical commitment.
normal.timeline: Strategic evolution log. Since 2022, I have been hardening my technical expertise through the intersection of academic rigor and operational implementation.
normal.contact: Secure Comms Link Active. Initiate contact via LinkedIn or GitHub to discuss mission-critical roles or strategic collaborative opportunities.

recruiter.hero: Hi, I am Sriman, a Cybersecurity Enthusiast. I'm specifically interested in SOC Analyst roles and building automated detection pipelines. I'm currently a student at SRM University AP, focusing on real-world defense. Welcome to my professional portfolio.
recruiter.about: I am a B.Tech student specializing in Cybersecurity. I have a strong foundation in SOC operations, incident triage, and network security fundamentals.
recruiter.skills: In a professional context, I focus on SIEM tools like Splunk and ELK, alongside network forensic tools like Wireshark. I use Python to automate repetitive security tasks.
recruiter.projects: My projects focus on solving real-world security gaps, such as automating log analysis and building intrusion detection systems from scratch.
recruiter.certs: I've earned certifications from Google and IBM to validate my skills in security analysis and incident response.
recruiter.timeline: My academic journey at SRM University has been focused on practical cybersecurity skills, preparing me for a high-impact role in a modern SOC.
recruiter.contact: I'm always open to discussing internship or full-time opportunities. You can find my contact details and LinkedIn profile below.
